healthy.summary: No disease action is indicated by this scan.
steps: Use clean tools and good field hygiene.
healthy.authority: General crop monitoring guidance; verify with MOFA/PPRSD or a local extension officer.

uncertain.summary: The image cannot be diagnosed reliably.
steps: Retake one leaf in bright, even light.
Fill most of the frame and avoid hands or soil.
If symptoms persist, contact a district agricultural extension officer.
uncertain.authority: Safety fallback — no chemical recommendation is made.

default.summary: This result needs confirmation before treatment.
steps: Isolate or mark the affected plant where practical.
Photograph both sides of several affected leaves.
Ask a MOFA/PPRSD or COCOBOD/CRIG officer to confirm the diagnosis and current approved control.
default.authority: CropGuard does not invent pesticide products, dosages, or schedules. Verified protocols must be added before release.
